canonical_definition: An uncertainty estimation method that constructs a similarity graph over sampled responses and computes the sum of eigenvalues of its Laplacian matrix to quantify response diversity.
papers: VELA: AnLLM-Hybrid-as-a-Judge Approach for Evaluating Long Image Captions
Your Language Model Can Secretly Write Like Humans: Contrastive Paraphrase Attacks onLLM-Generated Text Detectors
